creator: cokane@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 2007-04-30 at 10:34 -0400, Peter Thoenen wrote:
> Been a couple months so just pinging the bug to see if we can get some 
> movement as patch is approved.
> 
> -Peter

Sorry I have been on the road for a bunch of time. I got the patch
together, but now the ports freeze is almost upon us. To be safe, I'm
gonna hold off until that's over.

Thanks for the nudge regarding this.

--
Coleman
